name: Weave Home Retail Social Posts
description: Use a reusable template for a retail campaign with product-forward square posts, lifestyle overlays, and a warm family promo card. This set adapts the supplied three-post composition with a fictional home brand, original copy, Unsplash photos passed through JSON image layers, and shifted warm neutrals.
